footer.audience: MindHive was designed for students & teachers who seek authentic STEM research experience, and for neuroscientists & cognitive/social psychologists who seek to address their research questions outside of the lab.
footer.description: MindHive is a web-based citizen science platform that supports real-world brain and behavior research.
footer.title: MindHive

helpCenter.platformGuideLink: You can see our general platform guide by clicking this link!

setAvailDescription: Set your availability to start mentoring. Click here to get started.

opportunity.description: Describe a project students can work on: title, video, time window, what they'll do, what they'll learn. Save it as a draft first if you're still putting it together, and publish when it's ready.
opportunity.locked: Unlocks once your profile is complete.

organization.description: Manage {{name}}'s mission, primary domain, logo, and team details.
organization.title: Edit your organization

profile.description: Choose whether you represent an organization or an individual, then fill in your name, mission, primary domain, and time commitment. Students see this on every opportunity you publish.

sponsorOnboarding.subtitle: Two quick steps and you're ready to host opportunities for students through MindHive Connect.
sponsorOnboarding.title: Let's get you set up

updateProfileDescription: You're already a part of the MindHive community! Update your profile by clicking here.

updates.noUpdate: There are no updates at the moment.
